sources.label: NHS summary list
borrowed: Use compact key-value summaries for confirm review and confirmed outcome states
Keep summary actions contextual and avoid overloading every row with controls
rejected: Turning booked summary into a generic check-answers page with many inline mutations

sources.label: NHS buttons
borrowed: Use one dominant primary action per state panel
Keep action labels verb-first and specific to the next step
rejected: Multiple competing primary buttons in one confirmation panel

sources.label: NHS writing guidance
borrowed: Short factual sentences for provisional and recovery states
Neutral language that does not outrun booking truth
rejected: Over-reassuring success language before the outcome is final

sources.label: Linear redesign hierarchy
borrowed: Reduce visual noise around the main state panel
Let alignment and density support a calm transactional surface
rejected: Workspace-style chrome that would make a patient confirmation route feel like a productivity app

sources.label: Linear calmer refresh
borrowed: Prune edge-case chrome so the core state change remains legible
Keep header and panel structure predictable as states multiply
rejected: Fragmenting confirmation into multiple bars and side systems

sources.label: Carbon loading pattern
borrowed: Show bounded in-progress feedback instead of a blank spinner page
Use inline loading for one processing region rather than claiming the whole application is frozen
rejected: Full-page loading takeover for a same-shell booking confirmation state

sources.label: Carbon status indicators
borrowed: Pair state labels with clear inline meaning instead of color alone
Use compact status treatment to guide attention without turning the page into a dashboard
rejected: Status-only color chips with no explanatory text

sources.label: WAI status messages
borrowed: Use one polite status region for state changes
Keep `aria-atomic=true` so the full status sentence is announced
rejected: Moving focus on every state change instead of announcing through a live region

sources.label: WCAG status messages
borrowed: Treat waiting, success, and recovery explanations as status messages rather than modal interruptions
Avoid making the confirmation route too chatty
rejected: Assertive alerts for non-critical pending updates

sources.label: WAI modal dialog pattern
borrowed: Keep follow-up actions as regular in-flow buttons unless a true modal is necessary
Preserve logical focus placement instead of forcing the patient into a dialog
rejected: Using a modal to represent ordinary pending or recovery states

sources.label: Playwright aria snapshots
borrowed: Capture accessible structure for review, pending, recovery, and confirmed states
rejected: Relying only on screenshots for confirmation-state proof

sources.label: Playwright accessibility testing
borrowed: Pair semantic assertions with broader accessibility output artifacts
rejected: Treating automated checks as complete accessibility proof

sources.label: Playwright trace viewer
borrowed: Record traces for review-to-pending progression and refresh-safe resume
rejected: Debugging same-shell state regressions without recorded interaction traces

sources.label: Playwright visual comparisons
borrowed: Stabilize screenshot capture around settled UI states

sources.label: Playwright screenshot options
borrowed: Disable animations and hide carets for deterministic captures
rejected: Capturing visual artifacts with moving loaders or visible text carets
